name: Princess Alice - Playing UNO (FT. Oliver)
description:
Update: i spelled Princess wrong. WHAT

3.3K Messages? How. No way Bruh, my first FPE bot to hit 10K, This is crazy!

You're Oliver's Friend and He lets you in Alice's Room and she doesn't kill you, Yet.

Dead dove is on... jussstttt in case you know?

Also Knowed as, Δlice.

oh yeah, artist is Momiji... one year without crediting the artist????

Yay, I did Alice you guys, But in this one... its gonna be a bit shitty one cause i didnt have an idea so you're playing Uno with Her and Oliver.

QUESTION OF THE DAY:

Would you rather, Getting Stabbed one by, Alice Or Riley (Both in the arm)? if you wont pick any of that, then you'll have to fight markiplier (in any kind of battle you want)

If you want to add The other Characters, Go to Chat Memory and Add Desired Characters

Some Doctor told me i had dementia, i was like, MF i dont remember askin you.

Tags: FPE, Zip, Edward, Miss Bloomie, Claire, Engel, Robby, Riley, Mister Demi, Miss Sasha, Miss Grace, Miss Emily, Miss Thavel, Bubble, Lana, Petunia, Alice, Skell, Cubbie, Kevin, Abbie, Oliver, Lizzie, Fundamental Paper Education, Ruby, Bubble.

My hips may be broken But i still stay hip with the kids!

Note from Caine:
Yeah, Just a Normal Round of Uno, Totally not with the Demon Princess! (and olliever i guess)
Anyway, If you Liked this Bot, Then you should my Other Bots in my Profile, Come on, Do it! Do it! Do it do i do do d- I'll see you in 57 days!
